novel_features.name: Novelty diffing
novel_features.description: Run an Actor and emit only items not seen in prior runs of that Actor.

novel_features.name: Cross-actor dataset FTS
novel_features.description: Full-text search across every cached dataset from every Actor, normalized into a common schema.

novel_features.name: True cost ledger
novel_features.description: Per-run USD cost report joining cached run metadata with the Apify monthly usage endpoint.

novel_features.name: Newsletter digest renderer
novel_features.description: Render a markdown digest from local store: dedupe by URL + title-similarity, rank by engagement+recency+novelty, fill a Go template.

novel_features.name: Curated weekly workflow
novel_features.description: Run a YAML-declared workflow that chains run → normalize → novelty → digest → publish across multiple Actors.

novel_features.name: Schedule-as-code
novel_features.description: Declarative cron + Actor input bundle with terraform-style plan/apply/diff against the live Apify schedule API.

novel_features.name: Cost budget enforcement
novel_features.description: Pre-flight cost projection from local p50/p90 of past runs for the same Actor; aborts run if projection exceeds budget.

novel_features.name: Input presets
novel_features.description: Capture known-good Actor input JSON from a prior run and replay with overrides.

novel_features.name: Actor A/B cost+quality test
novel_features.description: Run the same input through two competing Actors, normalize via unified schema, report cost-per-novel-item and overlap percentage.

novel_features.name: Local replay mode
novel_features.description: Run queries and template renders against the local SQLite copy of past datasets without hitting the API.
